title: Stage 06b Accessibility Audit Gate
description: Stage 6b (Accessibility Audit) gate. Authored by the QA role after running an axe-core / pa11y / Lighthouse accessibility audit against the changed UI. PASS requires zero critical AND zero serious WCAG violations. WARN allowed when moderate/minor findings exist but no critical/serious. When the change has no UI surface, set audit_skipped_reason and status PASS.

audit_method.description: Which tool ran the audit. Null only when audit_skipped_reason is set.

wcag_level.description: WCAG conformance level checked. AA is the standard floor; AAA is aspirational.

critical.description: Findings that completely break access for users with disabilities. Any > 0 → FAIL.

serious.description: Findings that severely impair access. Any > 0 → FAIL.

moderate.description: Findings that impair access but workarounds exist. > 0 → WARN, not FAIL.

minor.description: Findings that are friction but not blocking. > 0 → WARN, not FAIL.

components_audited.description: Components, routes, or pages that were audited. Used for traceability and to verify nothing was skipped.

audit_skipped_reason.description: When set, the audit was intentionally skipped (e.g. 'no UI changes in this PR', 'backend-only feature'). Status should be PASS and violations all zero. Captured for audit trail.

wcag_findings_url.description: Optional link to the raw findings report (axe JSON, pa11y HTML, Lighthouse JSON).
